message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U1",
      "title": "Solutions",
      "description": "Competencies related to types, concentration expressions, solubility, vapor pressure, ideal/non-ideal solutions, and colligative properties.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify different types of solutions",
        "Express the concentration of solutions using various units",
        "Explain factors affecting solubility",
        "Describe vapour pressure of liquid solutions",
        "Distinguish between ideal and non-ideal solutions",
        "Apply colligative properties to determine molar mass"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 1: Solutions",
      "chapter_name": "Solutions"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U2",
      "title": "Electrochemistry",
      "description": "Competencies related to electrochemical cells, Nernst equation, conductance, electrolysis, batteries, fuel cells, and corrosion.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain the working of electrochemical and galvanic cells",
        "Apply the Nernst Equation in cell potential calculations",
        "Analyze conductance of electrolytic solutions",
        "Describe processes in electrolytic cells and electrolysis",
        "Differentiate between batteries, fuel cells, and corrosion mechanisms"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 2: Electrochemistry",
      "chapter_name": "Electrochemistry"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U3",
      "title": "Chemical Kinetics",
      "description": "Competencies related to reaction rates, factors influencing rate, integrated rate equations, temperature dependence, and collision theory.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define the rate of a chemical reaction",
        "Analyze factors influencing the rate of reaction",
        "Derive and apply integrated rate equations for zero and first-order reactions",
        "Explain the temperature dependence of reaction rates",
        "Apply collision theory to explain chemical reactivity"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 3: Chemical Kinetics",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Kinetics"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U4",
      "title": "d and f Block Elements",
      "description": "Competencies related to periodic table position, electronic configuration, properties of transition elements, lanthanoids, actinoids, and applications.",
      "competencies": [
        "Locate d-block and f-block elements in the periodic table",
        "Write electronic configurations for d-Block Elements",
        "Describe general properties of Transition Elements (d-Block)",
        "Identify important compounds of transition elements",
        "Differentiate between Lanthanoids and Actinoids"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 4: d and f Block Elements",
      "chapter_name": "d and f Block Elements"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U5",
      "title": "Coordination Compounds",
      "description": "Competencies related to Werner's theory, nomenclature, isomerism, bonding theories (including metal carbonyls), and applications.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain Werner's Theory of Coordination Compound",
        "Define important terms pertaining to coordination compounds",
        "Apply IUPAC rules for nomenclature of coordination compounds",
        "Identify types of isomerism in coordination compounds",
        "Describe bonding theories including Metal Carbonyls"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 5: Coordination Compounds",
      "chapter_name": "Coordination Compounds"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U6",
      "title": "Haloalkanes and Haloarenes",
      "description": "Competencies related to classification, nomenclature, C-X bond nature, preparation methods, physical properties, chemical reactions, and polyhalogen compounds.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify haloalkanes and haloarenes based on structure",
        "Apply IUPAC nomenclature rules for halides",
        "Analyze the nature of C–X bond in organic halides",
        "Describe methods of preparation for haloalkanes and haloarenes",
        "Predict physical properties and chemical reactions of halogenated compounds"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 6: Haloalkanes and Haloarenes",
      "chapter_name": "Haloalkanes and Haloarenes"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U7",
      "title": "Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers",
      "description": "Competencies related to classification, nomenclature, functional group structures, specific properties of alcohols/phenols, and ethers.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify alcohols, phenols, and ethers based on structure",
        "Apply IUPAC nomenclature for these compounds",
        "Draw structural representations of functional groups",
        "Differentiate properties between Alcohols and Phenols"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 7: Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers",
      "chapter_name": "Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U8",
      "title": "Aldehydes, Ketones and Carboxylic Acids",
      "description": "Competencies related to carbonyl/carboxyl group nomenclature and structure, preparation methods, physical properties, chemical reactions, and uses.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply IUPAC rules for Aldehydes, Ketones, and Carboxylic Acids",
        "Describe the structures of Carbonyl and Carboxyl groups",
        "Outline methods of preparation for these functional group compounds",
        "Compare physical properties and chemical reactions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 8: Aldehydes, Ketones and Carboxylic Acids",
      "chapter_name": "Aldehydes, Ketones and Carboxylic Acids"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U9",
      "title": "Amines",
      "description": "Competencies related to amine structure, classification, nomenclature, preparation methods, physical properties, chemical reactions, and diazonium salts.",
      "competencies": [
        "Describe the structure of Amines",
        "Classify amines based on substitution patterns",
        "Apply IUPAC rules for naming amines",
        "Explain synthesis (preparation) methods for amines",
        "Analyze chemical reactions involving Diazonium Salts"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 9: Amines",
      "chapter_name": "Amines"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-U10",
      "title": "Biomolecules",
      "description": "Competencies related to the classification and properties of carbohydrates, proteins, enzymes, vitamins, nucleic acids, and hormones.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify Carbohydrates based on hydrolysis behavior",
        "Describe the structure and function of Proteins",
        "Explain the role of Enzymes in biological processes",
        "Categorize Vitamins and Nucleic Acids"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 10: Biomolecules",
      "chapter_name": "Carbohydrates"
    }
  ]
}
